{"query":"Zelenskyy July 16 2026 protests Kyiv other cities defense minister dismissal crowd size demands cabinet reshuffle","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2354,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/7/16/hundreds-protest-in-kyiv-over-zelenskyys-dismissal-of-defence-minister","title":"Hundreds protest in Kyiv over Zelenskyy’s dismissal of defence minister | Russia-Ukraine war News | Al Jazeera","content":"Rare protests have broken out in the Ukrainian capital against the dismissal of the country’s defence minister, part of a broader cabinet reshuffle initiated by President Volodymyr Zelenskyy that has exposed rifts in Ukraine’s military establishment.
Hundreds demonstrated near the Ivan Franko National Theatre in central Kyiv on Thursday against the move to replace Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov, who was credited with boosting Ukraine’s drone warfare during his short six-month tenure.
Protesters also rallied in several other cities, including Lviv, Odesa and Dnipro, while in Kyiv, they chanted “Shame!” and carried placards reading “The Russians are celebrating”.","date":"1 day ago"},{"url":"https://www.nhregister.com/news/world/article/protesters-rally-in-kyiv-as-zelenskyy-moves-to-22347403.php","title":"Ukrainians protest Zelenskyy's ouster of his popular defense minister","content":"Zelenskyy said he was considering Interior Minister Ihor Klymenko as one of the candidates to succeed Fedorov.
Before becoming defense minister in January, Fedorov headed Ukraine’s digital transformation policies.
The mostly young protesters who took to the streets of Kyiv and other cities to support Fedorov made crude remarks about the current military commander, chanting, “Syrskyi go away!” and “A European army for a European country!”
Kyiv resident Bohdan Huryak said he was “deeply outraged” by Fedorov’s exit.
Pavlo Yelizarov, quit over Fedorov’s dismissal.
Parliament overwhelmingly approved Serhii Koretskyi, the head of state energy company Naftogaz, as the country’s new prime minister.
Zelenskyy swiftly reversed course in July 2025 when large street protests broke out over a new law that would have curbed the independence of the country’s anti-corruption watchdogs."},{"url":"https://www.the-star.co.ke/news/world/2026-07-16-protests-in-ukraines-cities-against-zelenskys-removal-of-defence-minister","title":"Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister","content":"2 days ago — Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister. A crowd of people - mostly young - gathered in Kyiv, holding up ...Read more
A crowd of people - mostly young - gathered in Kyiv, holding up signs reading "Hands off Fedorov" and "Stop sabotaging victory!" and chanting "Shame!".
Protests have been taking place in several Ukrainian cities against President Volodymyr Zelensky's surprise dismissal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.
MPs were due to vote later on Thursday on the proposed replacement as defence minister, Ihor Klymenko, who currently heads the interior ministry.
"This is the worst mistake Zelensky has made during his entire presidency," Oleksandr, a Ukrainian soldier, told the BBC.
I don't want this to go on," Maria Lavrynets, 31, told the BBC at a protest in Ivan Franko square in central Kyiv.
Pavlo Yelizarov, a renowned drone unit commander, resigned from his position of deputy commander of the Ukrainian Air Force in protest at Fedorov's sacking - a move he called "a great evil for the country's defence capability"."},{"url":"https://www.usnews.com/news/business/articles/2026-07-16/protesters-rally-in-kyiv-as-zelenskyy-moves-to-oust-ukraines-defense-minister","title":"Ukrainians Protest Zelenskyy's Ouster of His Popular ...","date":"2 days ago","content":"2 days ago — The mostly young protesters who took to the streets of Kyiv and other cities to support Fedorov made crude remarks about the current military ...Read more"},{"url":"https://streamlinefeed.co.ke/news/mass-kyiv-protests-erupt-over-zelenskyy-defense-minister-dismissal","title":"Mass Kyiv Protests Erupt Over Zelenskyy Defense Minister ...","date":"1 day ago","content":"1 day ago — Hundreds of demonstrators flood Kyiv streets to condemn President Volodymyr Zelenskyy's abrupt termination of anti-corruption Defense Minister ..."}]}

He was leaving the government after just six months in the post. Protesters Rally in Kyiv as Zelenskyy Moves to Oust Ukraine's Defense Minister. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has moved to dismiss Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Hundreds of protesters gathered in downtown Kyiv and in other Ukrainian cities Thursday after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy moved to dismiss his defense minister, as parliament appointed a new prime minister as part of a major government reshuffle. Ukraine’s parliament approved Serhii Koretskyi, the head of state energy company Naftogaz, as the country’s new prime minister. Ukrainians gather to denounce President Volodymyr Zelensky's decision to dismiss Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov in Kyiv, Ukraine, on July 16, 2026. Thousands of people gathered in downtown Kyiv and other Ukrainian cities on July 16 to demand that parliament reappoint Mykhailo Fedorov as defense minister following his dismissal. President Volodymyr Zelensky's dismissal of Fedorov has sparked a wave of criticism from lawmakers, soldiers, veterans, and civil society figures, who argue Ukraine is losing one of its most effective wartime officials without a clear explanation. Ukraine's Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Hundreds of people have gathered near the Ivan Franko National Theatre in central Kyiv to protest against the dismissal of Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov, as parliament approved a new prime minister amid a controversial cabinet reshuffle. Writing on X, Fedorov said it had been “a great honour to serve the Ukrainian people” as the minister of defence, before outlining what he described as the ministry’s key achievements during his tenure, including disabling “Starlink access for Russian forces” and launching programmes to expand Ukraine’s domestic drone production amid the ongoing war with Moscow. The 35-year-old technology specialist, who previously served as Ukraine’s first minister for digital transformation, has been credited with streamlining bureaucracy and introducing a more data-driven approach to the war against Russia.
